name: American Resources Corp
summary: American Resources Corporation (AREC) acquires and operates coal mining and processing assets in eastern Kentucky and western West Virginia, focused on metallurgical coal for steelmaking. Subsidiaries include American Infrastructure Corporation (coal mining), ReElement Technologies (critical and rare earth element purification and monetization), and Electrified Materials Corporation (recovered metal and steel aggregation). All mining operations are currently idled due to adverse market conditions.
